bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: RAG tension reads dead flux field instead of run.hidden.tension. Changed run.get('flux',{}).get('tension',40) to run.get('hidden',{}).get('tension',40). Tension is stored at run.hidden.tension per store_run.gd:28.
Dead Souffle system reference. opt['cost'] = 1 assigned to center option referencing removed Souffle resource. Removed dead cost assignment — bible v2.4 has no option cost system.

Dot notation dict access in configure_from_registry(). entry.tag and entry.context_default used dot notation on Dictionary. Changed to entry.get('tag','') and entry.get('context_default',4096) for safe access.

ClassDB.class_exists('MerlinOmniscient') dead code. MerlinOmniscient is a GDScript class (not GDExtension) — ClassDB check always returns false, falling through to script loading. Simplified to direct instantiation via class_name.

overall_assessment: All known bugs resolved. 12 total bugs fixed across 4 cycles: 2 CRITICAL (missing await), 6 HIGH (biome names, effect format, rng bias, gauge instance, encapsulation, null ref), 4 MEDIUM (faction defaults, deterministic minigame, flux tension, souffle cost, dict access, ClassDB dead code). Zero known issues remaining.
